#
# Runtime pin for the published github-security-report tool that this
# composite action installs from PyPI on non-pull_request runs when the
# tool_version input is left empty. Keeping the pin here (rather than as a
# static default in action.yaml) lets Dependabot's pip ecosystem propose
# version bumps through a cooldown-gated PR instead of a hand-edited
# default that silently drifts each release.
github-security-report==0.7.0
